session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. PR #8954 has been updated: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8954
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py`**: - Added `LaunchScreen` import - Added `"l"` key binding for launch action - Added `action_launch()` — opens the LaunchScreen modal with the selected node's command context - Added `_on_launch_result()` — delegates the chosen command to `execute_command()` - Added `_execute_action_command()` — handles all ACTION commands (close, dispatch, land, rebase, address, rewrite, cmux checkout/teleport, incremental dispatch) by dismissing the modal and delegating to app-level async methods - Updated footer text to include `l: launch`
2. **`src/erk/tui/commands/provider.py`**: - Removed `_ALLOWED_CATEGORIES` filter from `NodeCommandProvider` so ACTION commands also appear in the Ctrl+P command palette from the nodes screen - Removed unused `CommandCategory` import
All 139 relevant tests pass, type checking passes, and lint is clean.
